lineage.Process: CalculateField draft_boundary_20230303_poly Comment "High Protection Zone, Option 1" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_20230303_poly Comment "High Protection Zone" VB #
CalculateField "March 27, for industry, bll, scallop\DFO Draft Boundary Design (March 27, 2023)" Version "March 10" VB #
CalculateField "March 27, for industry, bll, scallop\DFO Draft Boundary Design (March 27, 2023)" Version "March 27" VB #

CalculateField draft_boundary_20230327 AreasForConsideration "Areas for Consideration" VB #
CalculateField "Draft Boundary Design (March 2023)" AreasForConsideration "Potential PLL" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_20230427 num_temp [OBJECTID] VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" Map_lbl [num_temp] VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" Map_lbl [num_temp] VB #

CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" num_temp 2 VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" num_temp 6 VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" num_temp 4 VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" num_temp 3 VB #
CalculateField "DFO Draft Boundary Design (June 6, 2023)" num_temp 5 VB #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/2.8.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\GIS\FCBB\data\Draft_Boundary_20230606.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>draft_boundary_20230606_corrections_NAD83</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>bll_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>bll_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>bottom_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>bottom_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>pll_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>pll_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>lobster_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>lobster_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>harpoon_rr_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>harpoon_rr_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>hagfish_exclusion</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_alias>hagfish_exclusion</field_alias><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_b AreasForConsideration "" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_b AreasForConsideration "July 2023" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_c protection_zone "High Protection Zone" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_c protection_zone "Benthic Protection Zone" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_c protection_zone "Bottom contact gear allowed" VB #
CalculateField draft_boundary_trawl_suggestions_20231010_c protection_zone "Limited Use Zone" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones Comment "Bottom Longline, Targeted Pelagic Gears" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones Comment "Bottom Longline, Trap Gear, Targeted Pelagic Gears" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones Comment "Targeted Pelagic Gears" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones Comment "Longline (Pelagic & Bottom), Trap Gear, Targeted Pelagic Gears" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones Comment "Pelagic Longline, Targeted Pelagic Gears" VB #
CalculateField Proposed_MPA_Boundary_2024_zones TargetedGears "Targeted Pelagic Gears include: Tended Line, Handline, Trolling Gear, Angling, Harpoon/Spear, Electric Harpoon, Buoy Gear" VB #
CalculateField FCBB_Proposed_MPA_Boundary_zones Allowed [Comment] VB #
CalculateField FCBB_Proposed_MPA_Boundary_zones TargPelag [TargetedGe] VB #
CalculateField FCBB_Proposed_MPA_Boundary_zones km_UTM [area_utm_k] VB #
CalculateField FCBB_Proposed_MPA_Boundary_zones km_Albers [area_alber] VB #
